creator: wxs@atarininja.org
text:
On Tue, Mar 20, 2007 at 12:20:16AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of math/libtommath,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/110549 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/110549

Approved.  Please commit.

-- WXS
